name: shell-functions
description: Personal collection of zsh/bash helper scripts. See README.md and CLAUDE.md.

scripts.ci: bun run ci:shellcheck && bun run ci:syntax && bun run ci:executable && bun run ci:shebang
scripts.ci:executable: find bin -type f -name '*.sh' ! -perm -u+x | awk '{print "Not executable: " $0; ec=1} END{exit ec+0}'
scripts.ci:shebang: find bin -type f -name '*.sh' -print0 | xargs -0 awk 'FNR==1 && !/^#!/{print "Missing shebang: " FILENAME; ec=1} END{exit ec+0}'
